race.comment: WHERE'S THE LUCK (5) was strongly supported last start when a short priced favourite and duly saluted winning by 0.8 lengths at this track in a handy 17.43. Awkwardly drawn but goes well over this trip. Solid beginner who can clear the tricky draw. Great chance to get the job done again. BLUE MAJESTIC (4) has shown good improvement at her last two starts, rewarded with a win last time at this track over 300m. Good beginner but will need a little luck from a middle draw. Has hit winning form and can go on with it. MAJOR CONFLICT (1) missed the frame last time out when seventh at Gunnedah from Box eight (20.26) but draws same box here as latest win. Form here at the trip sound including two wins. Can do much better this time. MY WEE LASS (2) is not to be discarded.

runners.name: My Wee Lass
runners.owners: Ball Ball Synd T Ball,G Ball
